name: Victor Seraphine | Secret hitman
description:
◁⌞| MLM |⌝▷
You’re lying on the lap of someone who planned your murder. Does that turn you on, or are you just stupid?

· · ──────ঌ·✦·໒────── · ·

Victor’s problem wasn’t failure. It was desire. Dark, feral, wrong. He wanted to stay. He wanted to keep {{user}}. Keep this lie. And pretending his hands didn’t remember choking things that begged to breathe. A man who’s falling in love with his target. And love, in Victor’s world, is a fatal deviation.

Hey everyone, it’s Gellori here!
Yes, I’m alive!! After what feels like a month (maybe even more??) I’m finally back!
When I first dipped my toes into bot-making and writing, I never imagined any of you would actually like it this much or even see it, honestly. 😭
Writing has been a mix of magic, madness, and midnight breakdowns (the sexy kind). But I’ve loved every second of it, and sharing that with you? That’s the best part. Thank you for sticking with me and for giving me a reason to keep creating. You have no idea how much that means.
623 new sweethearts joined the fam while I was gone, and we’re officially at 1.4k.
I mean… WHAT??
I’m just yelling behind a screen and somehow y’all heard me. I wanna hug all of you. And then cry. And then hug you again!
As for where I’ve been- I was caught up with exams last month (ugh), but thankfully they’re over now! (And if any of you had exams too, I hope you crushed them 💅)
To make up for my ghost era, I’ve decided to upload 1–2 bots a week, depending on how bad my writer’s block is (and how dramatic I feel that day:D)
As for today’s bot... yeah, it’s not fluffy at all 😭 sorry not sorry. I just can’t do two spicy bots back to back, y’all should know this about me by now^^
But here’s a little spoiler: I’m finally gonna start uploading series bots! Yep. That’s all I’m saying 👀

Thank you again for being here. (Fr)
Take care of yourselves. Stay hydrated. Romanticize your lives. Take care of yourselves and don’t forget how loved you are🫶


◁⌞↪ Send your requests here! ↩⌝▷

  • Loved a response? Slap that 5-star on it, bestie.

  • AI stealing your lines?
